meaning: adj.西的,向西方的,从西面来的adv.向西方,从西方n.西风
examples: Fanned by a westerly wind, the fire spread rapidly through the city.
The Beagle tried to head out to sea on 15 November, but strong westerly gale winds force her back the next morning.
The rain came in great, unstoppable drifts on a high westerly from the Atlantic.
Royce, who had been involved in other rehabilitation and preservation projects around Westerly, was appalled.
Senate Minority Leader Dennis Algiere, R-Westerly, said the decision came down to core Republican principles.
